_notes: FLAG: Client name and email appear to have typos. Confirm spelling: 'Guy Peterson' and 'guy.peterson@example.com' (or similar). Also: no specifics provided on brand video scope (subject, intended use, who's on camera) or headshot count. Defaults used: standard brand video scope language and full advanced headshot session. Travel calculated as one round trip to Billings (~140mi one way = 280mi).
title: Brand Video + Headshots

deliverables.title: Brand Video (Billings, MT)
deliverables.description: A polished brand video that tells your company's story. I'll handle everything from pre-production planning through final delivery, including on-location filming in Billings with professional lighting and audio.

lineItems.details: Full day on-location shoot in Billings with 2-3 camera angles, interviews, and B-roll. Includes pre-production planning, expectation setting, and full post-production edit.
Includes an extra hour for setup and teardown and the following lights: Aputure Nova, Aputure MC (x4), Amaran T4C, Amaran F22x + dBtx lavalier microphone packs.
Simple intro/outro title slides with Exampl logo and lower thirds graphics for anyone on camera.
Edited vertical version optimized for social media.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
Capture B-Roll of your team, workspace, and day-to-day operations to visually support the brand story.

deliverablesList: 90-180 second brand video, fully edited and color graded

milestones.milestone: Review shot list and confirm logistics

deliverables.title: Professional Headshots (Billings, MT)
deliverables.description: Full advanced headshot session on location in Billings with professional lighting. Multiple looks and backgrounds.

lineItems.details: Full headshot session with multiple looks, backgrounds, and professional lighting. Includes retouching and final delivery of high-resolution images.

deliverablesList: Professionally retouched headshot images, multiple looks
High-resolution files for web and print
deliverables.timeline: Shot same day as brand video. Delivered within 1 week.

deliverables.title: Travel (Bozeman to Billings, MT)
deliverables.description: Round trip travel from Bozeman to Billings. Approximately 280 miles.

lineItems.details: Flat rate of $1.25 per mile covering gas, driving time, gear hauling, and vehicle depreciation. Bozeman to Billings round trip, approximately 280 miles.
